# Source: https://docs.tabnine.com/main/getting-started/quickstart/menus-and-icons.md

# Menus and Icons

This document will guide you through the various menus and submenus in Tabnine. At the end of this document, you can look at a chart of the most common and important icons that Tabnine uses.

### **Main Input Menu**

The main menu in the IDE plugin will show you tabs for Tabnine Chat, Testing, or Settings. To the right there will be an additional three-lined icon (the 'hamburger submenu') indicating more options.

<figure><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-06242fadbea93698b4f4c1f41160e6a15b05bc02%2FMain%20Menu%20and%20Chat%20History.png?alt=media" alt=""><figcaption></figcaption></figure>

In that hamburger submenu, there will be options for a new chat, viewing the chat history, or creating a new test plan.

<figure><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-70e21f800e9accde6db3ff7636da37023329d313%2FMain%20Menu%20plus%20Hamburger.png?alt=media" alt=""><figcaption></figcaption></figure>

### Chat History Submenu

Within Chat history, another submenu will offer options for a new conversation or to delete chat history. This includes the same option for New Conversation, as well as the option to Delete Chat History.

<figure><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-6adb083ef016e5a44f16803d92c4789595cfd5f3%2Fimage.png?alt=media" alt=""><figcaption><p>As appearing in Visual Studio Code</p></figcaption></figure>

### Chat Input Menu

You will see a list of icons to select how to input content. Either simply type or choose one of those three icons to 1) reference a specific ***extension or code snippet**,* 2) see a list of ***custom commands***, 3) ***attach an image***, and ***4) Jira***. To the far right of that menu within the text window, there will be a cleft arrow to press in order to ***submit***.

<figure><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-62cd5d2c8de54c775516b2e427efaef1a0055840%2FChat%20input%20menu.png?alt=media" alt=""><figcaption><p>[From left to right] 1) Mention specific extension or code snippet, 2) Use a custom command, 3) Attach an Image, 4) Jira, and 5) Submit</p></figcaption></figure>

After submitting a query, you can elect to stop a response while it's processing by hitting the red square button (<img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-df6da2c1262733dde60da7d6b4ffcfd94bf7c738%2FStop%20Button.png?alt=media" alt="" data-size="line">).

### Context Icons

Within the text input window, there will be tabs indicating what is currently included in the context of Tabnine Chat's answers. They will often include 1) Current file, 2) Workspace, and 3) Codebase. To the right of those tabs, there will be an option to "**+ Add scope**."

Current File — Workspace — Codebase — + Add Scope

<figure><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-cab7bc1b487844df39bf5735511439f384a65f8b%2FScreenshot%202025-02-20%20at%2018.04.03.png?alt=media" alt=""><figcaption><p>As appearing in Visual Studio Code</p></figcaption></figure>

When clicking "**+ Add scop**e," a list titled "Add context scope" will appear above the text window. Checkmarks will appear next to resources already included in context. Beneath those, there will be an option to add another repository to the context.

<figure><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-8fe669ec37e4bc566eae7d51243d879c9142ff81%2FAdd%20Context%20Scope%202.png?alt=media" alt=""><figcaption><p>When you click '<strong>+ Add Scope</strong>', an additional '<strong>Add context scope</strong>' menu will appear above the text input window.</p></figcaption></figure>

When you open the **🌐︎ Remote Codebase** option, you will see options to add a 1) remote repository, 2) remote folder, or 3) remote file:

<figure><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-6a06fdc8ba5fa089113bbc0a093f58df67b4c36a%2FAdd%20Remote%20Codebase.png?alt=media" alt=""><figcaption></figcaption></figure>

When you hover your mouse over a code snippet in Tabnine Chat, the following menu will appear in the bottom right corner. You can choose any of these options to add the generated code to the current file, or create a new file for that snippet:

<figure><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-b7487835d1e77345bc22442b12eaaac91a5ac624%2FSnippet%20Menu%20-%20Updated.png?alt=media" alt=""><figcaption><p>Apply — Insert at Cursor — Copy — Create New File [with snippet]</p></figcaption></figure>

#### Apply

{% hint style="info" %}
Your version of this menu might be updated to look like this:\
\
![](https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-cc3b4cd146983d6747d661d57a5ca52e2274211f%2FApply.png?alt=media)\
\
It expands when you hover your mouse over it:\
\
![](https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-45e24e4dcbb2f58a4357aae40c48cab7de37c5f0%2FBlue%20Apply%20New.png?alt=media)
{% endhint %}

### Managing Tabnine

The Tabnine Enterprise logo and name will appear at the bottom right of the IDE window to manage the extension:

<figure><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-f1d3352f08cc5b58c9b5b7997cc48cef776e45ca%2FTabnine%20Enterprise%20long%20logo.png?alt=media" alt=""><figcaption><p>As the Tabnine Enterprise management banner appears in Visual Studio Code</p></figcaption></figure>

<figure><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-82e6f110182d3f9e47d562ff607662ae969ac291%2FTabnine%20Enterprise%20red.png?alt=media" alt=""><figcaption><p>As the Tabnine Enterprise management banner appears in Eclipse, JetBrains IDEs, and Visual Studio</p></figcaption></figure>

In Visual Studio Code, manage the extension with the 8-spoked cog icon:

<figure><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-2032212cfb70b8e6a59b0119aa186283fcc42820%2Fimage.png?alt=media" alt=""><figcaption><p>As the Tabnine Enterprise management panel appears in Visual Studio Code</p></figcaption></figure>

The menu will appear differently in other IDEs:

<div><figure><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-d001511566b0eca2539940a0ce95abc9132fbb10%2FEclipse%20menu.png?alt=media" alt=""><figcaption><p>The menu as it appears in Eclipse</p></figcaption></figure> <figure><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-68e4a13051e1572bd8853e1160fa05aed4d46638%2FJetBrains%20menu.png?alt=media" alt=""><figcaption><p>The Tabnine Enterprise menu as it appears in JetBrains IDEs</p></figcaption></figure></div>

There, you can turn off info and warning notifications, or manage the extension:

<figure><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-532375436b525052686fb472d0282397c4e8d487%2Fimage.png?alt=media" alt=""><figcaption><p>As appearing in Visual Studio Code</p></figcaption></figure>

### Chat Response Menu

You can indicate your satisfaction with Tabnine Chat's response by choosing the thumbs-down or thumbs-up buttons at the bottom of the response. There will also be a copy icon in that menu and the option to apply all suggested changes:

<figure><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-4139c03fa76f71e81401655d52266d17bda708a3%2FChat%20response%20Menu%2024-03-25.png?alt=media" alt=""><figcaption><p>Apply All — Copy Message — Not Helpful — Helpful (Visual Studio Code)</p></figcaption></figure>

### Chart of Icons

| Where                         | Icon                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Description                   |
| ----------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------- |
| At multiple points            | <img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-c99f96542814962beffb0c344156d8bb85fa208b%2FTabnine%20red.png?alt=media" alt="" data-size="line">            | Current Tabnine logo          |
| At multiple points, some docs | <img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-c9d29871d59e80eff95190f59b95e845d48e2f05%2FTabnine%20old%20colors.png?alt=media" alt="" data-size="line">   | Old Tabnine logo (old colors) |
| IDE plugin menu               | <img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-174f77a4f925020d6c4a2750d25b7fb5a0c87c84%2FTabnine%20Loading%20icon.png?alt=media" alt="" data-size="line"> | Tabnine loading               |

### Chat Response

<table><thead><tr><th width="99.4248046875">Icon</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-52efd967a60e1e784c77b6cfd0bacc8054983bf8%2FTabnine%20Analyzing.gif?alt=media" alt="" data-size="line"></td><td>Analyzing your request / Generating</td></tr><tr><td><mark style="color:red;"><strong>✓</strong></mark></td><td>Request complete</td></tr><tr><td><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-101ff78de48002b5be23f1320d5c80233b92c018%2FGenerate%20question.svg?alt=media" alt="" data-size="line"></td><td>Suggested query</td></tr></tbody></table>

### Chat Input Menu

<table><thead><tr><th width="99.6201171875">Icon</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><em>@</em></td><td>Reference extension or code snippet</td></tr><tr><td><em>/</em></td><td>Commands/Custom commands</td></tr><tr><td><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt=""></td><td>Attach an image</td></tr><tr><td><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt=""></td><td>Submit</td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><thead><tr><th width="99.6298828125">Icon</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-cb7d049bbaade6907c907b6163d03fe7e3511daf%2FAlert%20icon%20thicc.png?alt=media" alt="" data-size="line"></td><td>Failed to get the selected code</td></tr><tr><td><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-e3c45a5ca96ad789c53f2957d6147044613bc6cd%2Ftest%20plan%202%20icon.svg?alt=media" alt="" data-size="line"></td><td>Test plan</td></tr></tbody></table>

### Chat Response Menu

<table><thead><tr><th width="100.15234375">Icon</th><th>Name</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-5b41b192097edc510e04261a524a19ca87999282%2Ficon%3Dapply.svg?alt=media" alt="" data-size="line"></td><td>Apply all</td></tr><tr><td><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-938f5ac632f9f3c6e7a678007a93ff24b5d50048%2Ficon%3Dcopy.svg?alt=media" alt="" data-size="line"></td><td>Copy</td></tr><tr><td><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-1c20fd126777d9ada908980d94da9aa6a5801148%2Ficon%3Dhelpful.svg?alt=media" alt="" data-size="line"></td><td>Helpful response</td></tr><tr><td><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-cf6d62c0769ec4ef35a6d0cbe21eb5a60e872563%2Ficon%3Dnot%20helpful.svg?alt=media" alt="" data-size="line"></td><td>Unhelpful response</td></tr></tbody></table>

### Chat results snippet menu

<table><thead><tr><th width="99.95703125">Icon</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-5b41b192097edc510e04261a524a19ca87999282%2Ficon%3Dapply.svg?alt=media" alt="" data-size="line"></td><td>Apply</td></tr><tr><td><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-668804e0841abb493db65d26135e9881cbde769c%2Ficon%3Dinsert.svg?alt=media" alt="" data-size="line"></td><td>Insert at Cursor</td></tr><tr><td><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-938f5ac632f9f3c6e7a678007a93ff24b5d50048%2Ficon%3Dcopy.svg?alt=media" alt="" data-size="line"></td><td>Copy</td></tr><tr><td><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-df843452606382be89e822f84efff96754307264%2Ficon%3Dnew%20file.svg?alt=media" alt="" data-size="line"></td><td>New File</td></tr></tbody></table>

### Main Input Menu

<table><thead><tr><th width="99.7421875">Icon</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-539bc0dfa799a150ab9bd1dcda668748c6d96df8%2Ficon%3Dchat.svg?alt=media" alt="" data-size="line"></td><td>Tabnine Chat</td></tr><tr><td><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-e505342cb615d233366f17f15bf5dfa1cc5e3cb7%2Ficon%3Dmagic%20wands.svg?alt=media" alt="" data-size="line"></td><td>Tabnine Change</td></tr><tr><td><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-b523ba4cb5318ef7d94de7ccf65735e4e92e7097%2Ficon%3Dtest%402x.png?alt=media" alt="" data-size="line"></td><td>Testing</td></tr><tr><td><p><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-ac11a59d6d7626e3a2751a2fa08e8d5681437933%2Ficon%3Dsettings2.svg?alt=media" alt="" data-size="line"></p><p>(6-spoke)</p></td><td>Settings</td></tr><tr><td><img src="https://3436682446-files.gitbook.io/~/files/v0/b/gitbook-x-prod.appspot.com/o/spaces%2FY2qxVf5VTm3fmwP4B4Gx%2Fuploads%2Fgit-blob-5ffdee7da23c7ed939e76594f54f18fc5e738b46%2Ficon%3Dmenu.svg?alt=media" alt="" data-size="line"></td><td>Hamburger submenu</td></tr></tbody></table>

### Hamburger Submenu ☰
